title: 3 Biotech Stocks That Wall Street Analysts Can't Get Enough Of
text: This year has not been kind to biotech stocks, as the sector's most popular ETF, the iShares Biotechnology ETF (NASDAQ: IBB ), has fallen about 3% so far in 2023. Investors are probably worried about the impact of higher interest rates and potential reforms by Washington, DC on the sector.

title: IQVIA (IQV) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: Although the revenue and EPS for IQVIA (IQV) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.43 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.37 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.44 per share a year ago.
